elements.label: Description
elements.value: Visual feedback when scoring: score text pulses on merge, floating +N tags drift upward, displayed score counts up smoothly.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/properties/animation.schema.json, set sat_pulse to {{sat_pulse}}]
Set SCORE_PULSE_SCALE to {{sat_pulse}} in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/properties/animation.schema.json, set sat_pulse_decay to {{sat_pulse_decay}}]
Set SCORE_PULSE_DECAY to {{sat_pulse_decay}} in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/properties/animation.schema.json, set sat_tag_dur to {{sat_tag_dur}}]
Set FLOAT_TAG_DURATION to {{sat_tag_dur}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/properties/animation.schema.json, set sat_tag_speed to {{sat_tag_speed}}]
Set FLOAT_TAG_SPEED to {{sat_tag_speed}} px/s.
